scripts.local:api: ADMIN_AUTH_REQUIRED=false STORAGE_DRIVER=memory SNCFT_DEV_ADMIN_ROLE=superadmin npm run dev -w @sncft/api
scripts.local:import: ADMIN_TOKEN=dev-token CSV_DIR=${CSV_DIR:-$HOME/Desktop/csv} API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npm run import:all -w @sncft/api
scripts.local:test: npm run test -w @sncft/api && npm run test -w @sncft/import-engine && npm run check
scripts.supabase:api: ADMIN_AUTH_REQUIRED=true STORAGE_DRIVER=supabase SNCFT_DEV_ADMIN_ROLE=superadmin npm run dev -w @sncft/api
scripts.supabase:import: ADMIN_TOKEN=${ADMIN_TOKEN:-dev-token} CSV_DIR=${CSV_DIR:-$HOME/Desktop/csv} API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npm run import:all -w @sncft/api
